phase_name: CLI command surface hardening + Phase 6 raw-mode decision

completed_tasks.name: Wire /memory across shortlist, compare, detail, and launcher contexts
Make command-palette global commands actionable in active CLI views
Document raw-mode evaluation and skip decision
Run worker typecheck and CLI-focused Vitest suite

remaining_tasks.name: Review or commit the staged CLI command surface batch
After this batch closes, start Phase 8 mascot + visual polish from .planning/CLI_UPGRADE_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md

human_actions_pending.action: Decide whether to commit the staged batch now
human_actions_pending.context: The staged batch is coherent and verified. The untracked superpowers implementation plan is intentionally outside this batch.

decisions.decision: Skip full raw-mode migration for compare/detail/clarify/launcher prompts.
decisions.rationale: Current enquirer prompts plus slash-command interception satisfy the primary UX need; raw-mode line editing adds cross-terminal and multi-byte risks.

decisions.decision: Skip Phase 7 workflow/domain state-machine work for this CLI upgrade chain.
decisions.rationale: Phase 7 was conditional on Phase 6 proving raw-mode migration necessary.

decisions.decision: Keep Phase 8 as the next CLI upgrade step after this batch closes.
decisions.rationale: The command surface and raw-mode decision are now stable enough to proceed to mascot + visual polish.

next_action: Review or commit the staged CLI command surface batch; then start Phase 8 mascot + visual polish.
context_notes: Current GSD ROADMAP remains v1.8 Phase 14. Phase 8 refers to the CLI upgrade implementation plan, not the main GSD roadmap phase number.
